metadata_mapping.scene_title: og:title meta tag (strip ' at Ice Gay Tube' suffix) OR JSON-LD VideoObject > name if present
metadata_mapping.date: JSON-LD VideoObject > uploadDate if present; fallback: meta[name='date'] or visible date text near video
metadata_mapping.description: og:description meta tag OR JSON-LD VideoObject > description
metadata_mapping.cover_image: og:image meta tag OR JSON-LD VideoObject > thumbnailUrl[0]
metadata_mapping.performers: Anchor links on scene page matching href pattern /pornstars/{slug} — extract text; also present in page title for some scenes
metadata_mapping.tags: Anchor links on scene page matching href pattern /category/{slug} or /search/{tag} — extract text
metadata_mapping.studio: Anchor or text matching studio/channel section on scene page; fallback constant 'IceGayTube'

scene_title: meta[property='og:title'] — strip ' at Ice Gay Tube' suffix
Fallback: <title> tag, strip ' at Ice Gay Tube'
date: JSON-LD VideoObject['uploadDate'] if available (ISO-8601, strip to YYYY-MM-DD)
Fallback: text element near 'Added' or 'Published' label in page HTML
performers: CSS: a[href*='/pornstars/'] — anchor text gives performer name
May also appear in og:title for some scene title formats
tags: CSS: a[href*='/category/'] or a[href*='/search/'] in tag block — anchor text
studio: CSS: a[href*='/channel/'] or a[href*='/channels/'] anchor text

search_strategy.notes: Search endpoint https://www.icegaytube.tv/search/scenes?q={query} appears accessible. No Cloudflare challenge detected on public pages. sceneByName should be implementable by fetching search results and parsing scene links + og:title from each result card.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: sceneByFragment and sceneByQueryFragment depend on reliable title-based search and are lower priority. Recommend implementing sceneByName first and extending later if search quality is sufficient.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: No Cloudflare Managed Challenge detected on public pages during research.
Age gate may exist — set 'age_verified=1' or equivalent cookie defensively in all requests.
Use a realistic Firefox/Linux User-Agent and standard Accept/Accept-Language headers.
If search or scene pages start returning redirect or empty responses, add a cookie fallback.
known_limitations: JSON-LD VideoObject presence is inferred from site type — confirm on a live scene page before relying on it; og:* tags are the safer primary source.
Date field may not always be present in machine-readable form — may require text parsing of a 'Added X days ago' or absolute date string.
Studio/channel may not be present on all scenes — use constant fallback.
Performer name list may be incomplete for amateur/user-uploaded content with no tagged performers.
